name: dotcraft-wire
description: TypeScript SDK for the DotCraft AppServer Wire Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0)

scripts.test: npm run build:all && node --test dist/adapter.test.js dist/moduleAdapter.test.js dist/deliveredFrontier.test.js dist/turnReply.test.js dist/transport.test.js dist/conformance-variant.test.js
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @dotcraft/channel-feishu && npm run build --workspace @dotcraft/channel-weixin && npm run build --workspace @dotcraft/channel-telegram && npm run build --workspace @dotcraft/channel-qq
scripts.bundle:packages: npm run bundle --workspace @dotcraft/channel-feishu && npm run bundle --workspace @dotcraft/channel-weixin && npm run bundle --workspace @dotcraft/channel-telegram && npm run bundle --workspace @dotcraft/channel-qq
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:packages && npm run bundle:packages
scripts.test:packages: npm run test --workspace @dotcraft/channel-feishu && npm run test --workspace @dotcraft/channel-weixin && npm run test --workspace @dotcraft/channel-telegram && npm run test --workspace @dotcraft/channel-qq
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:packages
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck --workspace @dotcraft/channel-feishu && npm run typecheck --workspace @dotcraft/channel-weixin && npm run typecheck --workspace @dotcraft/channel-telegram && npm run typecheck --workspace @dotcraft/channel-qq
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:packages
scripts.generate:manifests: node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs packages/channel-feishu && node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs packages/channel-weixin && node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs packages/channel-telegram && node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs packages/channel-qq
scripts.pack:verify: npm pack --dry-run && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @dotcraft/channel-feishu && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @dotcraft/channel-weixin && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @dotcraft/channel-telegram && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @dotcraft/channel-qq
